renames.rationale: Called from a 3-lambda operator() composition, callee is __acrt_add_locale_ref; thin wrapper that bumps a locale ref count inside a CRT locale-update helper.
Calls __doserrno then FUN_140035d08 (errno mapper); classic CRT _dosmaperr-style helper that translates a DOS error code into errno.
Branches to _raise_exc_ex / _set_errno_from_matherr / _ctrlfp / _errcode; FP exception dispatch wrapper deciding between raising SIGFPE or setting errno.
158-instr helper called only from FUN_140045cd4, calls _set_statfp via FUN_140046498; applies the FP status word for the FP exception path.
Calls _set_errno_from_matherr and _ctrlfp from the FP exception dispatcher; sets errno from a matherr-style code.
Shared helper of the _set_statfp path called by the FP exception apply routine and a higher-level math wrapper.
Calls destroy_ptd_array then _free_base; per-thread-data array destructor releasing the PTD slot table.
Called from islower/isupper/__pctype_func/___mb_cur_max_func/___lc_codepage_func/___lc_locale_name_func; the shared per-thread ctype/locale lookup.
Two-instruction tail-call to _mbtowc_l from write_double_translated_ansi_nolock; thin wrapper invoking the locale-aware mbtowc on a translated ANSI char.
Calls __acrt_fltout, fp_format_f_internal, fp_format_e_internal; subroutine of FUN_140047bf4 that dispatches between %f and %e formatting.
Caller is type_case_a; calls fp_format_a/fp_format_e/fp_format_f_internal/__acrt_fltout/strcpy_s — top-level %a/%e/%f/%g printf FP formatter.
Called from common_getenv_nolock<wchar_t> and common_set_variable_in_environment_nolock<wchar_t>; uses __ascii_wcsnicmp + __acrt_CompareStringW to locate a wide env var.
Called from common_set_variable_in_environment_nolock<char>; uses _strnicmp_l + __acrt_CompareStringA — ANSI-side env var lookup counterpart of env_find_wchar_entry.
Seven-instruction wrapper that calls CloseHandle; orphan tiny thunk with no captured callers in this slice.
Calls _handle_nan plus FUN_1400553ec; double-precision FP special-case dispatcher (NaN / infinity handling).
Calls _handle_nanf and FUN_140055514; single-precision counterpart of fp_double_handle_special for float NaN/inf handling.
